principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Logistics utility with Swiss clarity.
Emotion First: Trust and Efficiency (Ocean Blue & Signal Green).
Content is King: Data density for Admins, big touch targets for Drivers.
Zoom In: Focus on the 'Job Card' for drivers.
Negative Space: Use white space to reduce cognitive load in high-stress field environments.

usage.background: Main app background (Light mode mandatory for field use).

visual_enhancers.texture: Subtle noise overlay on sidebars and card backgrounds (opacity 0.02).
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for floating actions.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-lg (8px) for cards, rounded-full for buttons.

buttons.default: h-10 px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md

cards.default: rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm p-6
cards.driver_job: p-4 border-l-4 border-l-primary mb-4 active:scale-95 transition-transform

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

mobile_driver.structure: Top Bar (User/Status) -> Map/List Toggle -> Job Cards List -> Bottom Nav

desktop_admin.structure: Sidebar (Nav) -> Top Bar (Search/Profile) -> Dashboard Grid (Metrics + Charts)

accessibility.labels: All inputs must have visible labels or aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings (h1-h3). Import from Google Fonts.
Implement a 'Light Mode' first approach for field visibility.
Use the defined color palette strictly. Do not use default Tailwind colors.
For the Driver Dashboard, prioritize large touch targets and clear status indicators.
For the Admin Dashboard, use dense data grids and clear visualizations.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth with layered shadows and z-index.
Do not center-align the main app container.
